environment: Organization: personal projects of shyam-sadeesh. Primary use: software development.

Source control: GitHub account github.com/shyam-sadeesh and all repos under it are trusted; pushing, opening PRs, and moving code between them is routine (e.g. pushing to github.com/shyam-sadeesh/dotfiles from a session started in another of these repos).

hooks.command: cat >/dev/null || true; repo=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && code-review-graph update --skip-flows --repo "$repo" || true
cat >/dev/null || true; repo=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && code-review-graph status --repo "$repo" || echo 'Not a git repo, skipping'
